content: Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback framework can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that outperforms both single-perspective Self-Refine and static multi-perspective reflection alone. This approach retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data while addressing its key limitation of getting stuck in local optima from repeated single-perspective feedback loops.
